title: Full-color XOROOTS header logo + subtle watermark logo for authenticated scrolling background

requirements.summary: Ensure the full-color XOROOTS logo is available as a static asset at the exact BRANDING.logo.src path and BrandLogo renders it.
acceptanceCriteria: `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png` exists and loads in the browser at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png`.
`BrandLogo` renders the image (not the text fallback) when the asset is present.

file_operations.description: Add/commit the full-color XOROOTS logo static image at this exact path so it is served at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo.dim_300x100.png` and continues to match `BRANDING.logo.src`.
Confirm BrandLogo continues to use `BRANDING.logo.src` for the header/hero full-color logo and only falls back to text on actual load error (no path changes to `BRANDING.logo.src`).

requirements.summary: Create a separate transparent watermark logo asset and use it for the authenticated scrolling background while keeping the header logo unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: A second static image asset exists at `frontend/public/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` and loads in the browser at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png`.
The authenticated scrolling background uses `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` (not the full-color header logo asset).
The header continues to render the full-color logo using `BRANDING.logo.src` unchanged.

file_operations.description: Add/commit the subtle transparent watermark-style XOROOTS logo static image at this exact path so it is served at `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png`.

Update the authenticated scrolling background CSS to reference `/assets/generated/xoroots-logo-watermark.dim_300x100.png` for the repeating pattern, ensuring the header continues using `BRANDING.logo.src` unchanged.

requirements.summary: Refine authenticated scrolling watermark background styling for subtlety/readability in light and dark themes and ensure it never blocks interactions or appears when logged out.
acceptanceCriteria: Background remains behind dashboard content (content stays above it) and does not capture pointer events.
Watermark opacity remains subtle in both themes (light and dark) and does not reduce text readability.
Scrolling animation remains continuous on authenticated pages only and does not appear on the logged-out landing page.

file_operations.description: Adjust `.authenticated-scrolling-logo-background` and `.logo-pattern` styling so the watermark remains subtle and readable in both themes (e.g., theme-specific opacity/mix-blend choices), remains behind content (z-index layering preserved), and cannot capture pointer events.
Verify the authenticated-only rendering condition for `AuthenticatedScrollingLogoBackground` remains intact so the scrolling watermark never appears on the logged-out landing page.
